candidates.why: Component of operating revenue related to finance leases, but not the full top-line; used as secondary fallback if total operating income unavailable.
Best representation of total revenue/top-line, aggregating operating income streams; appropriate primary revenue line.
Represents financial income, not operating revenue; inappropriate as main revenue measure.
Interest income from non-bank sources, part of financial income not operating revenue; should not be used for top-line.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Represents comprehensive income (bottom-line including OCI), not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to NCI, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income before NCI, a bottom-line measure not suitable for revenue.

variables.notes: Total operating income is the clear aggregate top-line; finance lease revenue is included as a secondary fallback source for revenue if the total line is missing in some years.

candidates.why: Explicitly labeled cost of goods sold, representing direct costs of sales; best match for COGS.
Mixed income/expense balancing item, not specifically COGS; not appropriate for direct production costs.
Overhead/operating expenses more akin to SG&A than COGS.
Financing costs, not cost of sales.
Another finance cost line, unrelated to cost of goods sold.
Inventory balance sheet item, not a period expense; not suitable for COGS mapping.

variables.notes: Direct cost line is clearly labeled as Cost of goods sold and matches COGS definition.

candidates.why: Represents operating income, not expense; should not be included in SG&A expense components.
Negative operating income adjustment; again income, not SG&A expense.
Small net balancing item mixing income and expense; not a clean SG&A component.
Represents miscellaneous operating expenses, consistent with SG&A-type overhead.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Net
candidates.why: Balance sheet intangible asset, not a period SG&A expense line.

variables.notes: Other operating expenses is the only clear SG&A-type overhead component among candidates; income and mixed items are excluded per SG&A rules.
No research & development expense line is present in the provided Income Statement; assuming XRD is not separately reported.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary interest expense line, net of capitalized interest; best match for interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; valid secondary form of interest expense.
Represents profit share for minority interests, not interest on debt.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; appropriate tertiary fallback for interest expense.
Equity attributable to minority shareholders, not an interest expense.
Label appears unused (no values) and is a balance sheet liability category, not an expense line.
Long-term interest-bearing debt balance, not period interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest is primary; lease-related interest and its supplemental disclosure are included as lower-priority fallbacks, while non-controlling interests and balance sheet debt items are excluded.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit (loss) of associates and joint ventures accounted for using equity method
candidates.why: Income from associates, not an equity balance; irrelevant for book equity mapping.
Component of equity but not total equity attributable to owners; too narrow for BE on its own.
Total equity attributable to shareholders (owners) of the parent, excluding non-controlling interests; best match for BE.
Combines shareholders' equity and non-controlling interests; would cause double counting with separate MIB line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing line, not a substantive equity category.
Total of both equity and liabilities; not appropriate for book equity alone.

variables.notes: Shareholders' Equity - Total represents equity attributable to the parent shareholders and excludes non-controlling interests, aligning with BE definition.

candidates.why: Represents the income attributable to non-controlling interests, but MIB is defined as a balance sheet amount; less suitable than the balance sheet line.
Balance sheet line for equity attributable to minority shareholders; best match for minority interest (MIB).
Income statement minority interest share; a flow, not the equity stock, so secondary at best.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to minorities (flow), not minority equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income before allocating to minorities; not minority interest itself.

variables.notes: Using the balance sheet Non-controlling interests line to capture minority equity (MIB); income-statement minority interest lines are flows and thus not used for this stock measure.
